case_title: PATEL, SAILESH vs. FITZPATRICK, LINDA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT FITZPATRICK, LINDA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

#1 BENSON/YEE: C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ATTY A EVJE APP FOR PLTF. DEFT L FITZPATRICK PRESENT IN PRO PER. SETTLED. TERMS NOT ON RECORD. DEFT UNDERSTANDS & AGREES TO TERMS. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FITZPATRICK, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2032 MISSION #37A, STAYED UNTIL FEB-06-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
